description_long: This kiosk features a striking modern design with a large, flat, overhanging roof in purple and white, supported by two central rectangular columns. The structure is open on all sides, allowing easy access, and includes integrated benches and tables with purple accents. The branding 'KRONOS HOMES' is prominently displayed on the upper fascia, accompanied by a geometric logo. The kiosk's layout is symmetrical, with seating areas and counters arranged on both sides of the central support. The materials appear to be primarily smooth, painted metal or composite panels, with some glossy surfaces and glass or acrylic display panels. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as plazas or exhibition spaces.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with a large purple and white overhanging roof, central columns, integrated seating, and prominent 'KRONOS HOMES' branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'KRONOS HOMES' logo, central columns, and seating areas on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the overhanging roof, side benches, and partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with visible seating, central columns, and branding details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open structure, benches, and the kiosk's symmetrical design.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign and logo, placed on the upper fascia above the main entrance and on side panels, with 'KRONOS HOMES' text and geometric logo
attribute_door_configuration: none; open entryways on all sides
attribute_roof_design: flat, rectangular overhanging roof with a smooth purple surface and white trim, no visible skylights or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern, minimalist with geometric lines and bold color accents
